mma8653_init.message0: Initialize MMA8653 accelerometer Range %1 Resolution %2 Data Rate %3
mma8653_init.tooltip: Initialize MMA8653 three-axis accelerometer with range, resolution and data rate

mma8653_set_mode.tooltip: Set the oversampling mode of MMA8653 sensor

mma8653_begin.tooltip: Start MMA8653 sensor to begin data acquisition

mma8653_read_x.tooltip: Read MMA8653 sensor X-axis acceleration value

mma8653_read_y.tooltip: Read MMA8653 sensor Y-axis acceleration value

mma8653_read_z.tooltip: Read MMA8653 sensor Z-axis acceleration value

mma8653_read_xyz.message0: Read all MMA8653 axis data to variables X %1 Y %2 Z %3
mma8653_read_xyz.tooltip: Read all three-axis acceleration data from MMA8653 sensor at once

mma8653_set_range.tooltip: Set the measurement range of MMA8653 sensor

mma8653_set_data_rate.tooltip: Set the data output rate of MMA8653 sensor

mma8653_set_resolution.tooltip: Set the data resolution of MMA8653 sensor

mma8653_is_active.tooltip: Check if MMA8653 sensor is in active state

mma8653_check_connection.tooltip: Check if MMA8653 sensor is properly connected

mma8653_get_roll.tooltip: Read MMA8653 sensor roll angle (rotation around X-axis)

mma8653_get_pitch.tooltip: Read MMA8653 sensor pitch angle (rotation around Y-axis)

mma8653_get_tilt.tooltip: Read MMA8653 sensor tilt angle relative to vertical
